name: Binary SRS Flashcard Model
description: A flashcard study mechanism with binary (correct/incorrect) responses and spaced repetition scheduling. This is a projection relation that maps content and user state into a study interface.

Stimulus.description: The prompt shown to the user (must resolve to displayable content)

Response.description: The expected correct answer (must resolve to displayable content)

SRS_Interval.description: Days until next review (must resolve to integer)
